history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A vibrant, high-contrast digital illustration with a dark, electric blue and purple neon aesthetic. The central focus is a stylized anime girl with long, dark hair, large, expressive eyes with heavy eyeliner, and wearing a school uniform consisting of a grey blazer, white shirt, and a prominent red ribbon tie. She is adjusting her round, silver-rimmed glasses with her hands.

To the right of the girl is a large, detailed QR code labeled "QR Code Standar Pembayaran Nasional" and "GPN". Below the QR code, it reads "Dikz shop" and "NMID: ID1025396511814 A01". Further text beneath the QR code states "SATU QRIS UNTUK SEMUA" and provides a website URL "www.aspi-qris.id" for checking the application organizer. There are small icons indicating payment methods: a phone with a QR code, a credit card, and a camera icon.

The background is a dynamic composition of glowing blue circuit board patterns and electric blue lightning bolts, creating a futuristic and energetic atmosphere. The words "SCAN" are prominently displayed at the top in a large, bold, glowing blue font, with "& SUPPORT US" underneath in a smaller white font.

Below the anime girl, a stylized banner reads "DIKZ MARKET" in bold, white, angular lettering with a dark outline.

Along the bottom of the image, there are four rounded, glowing neon rectangles containing contact information. The top left is a green WhatsApp icon with the text "WHATSAPP" and the phone number "087761058776". The top right is a blue Telegram icon with the text "TELEGRAM" and the handle "@DikzMarket01". The bottom left is a pink Instagram icon with the text "INSTAGRAM" and the handle "@dikz_20110909". The bottom right is a megaphone icon with the text "CHANNEL TELEGRAM" and the handle "@DikzMarket001".

The overall style is a mix of anime art and graphic design, with a strong emphasis on glowing neon elements and a dark, electric color palette dominated by blues, purples, and pinks, with accents of red and white. The mood is modern, tech-focused, and slightly mysterious due to the dark background and glowing effects.
